items.name: Torch
items.description_summary: Burns for 1 hour, bright light 20 ft, dim light 20 ft beyond.
items.effect: A torch burns for 1 hour, providing bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional 20 feet.

items.name: Rope, Hemp (50 ft)
items.description_summary: 50 ft of hemp rope. DC 17 STR check to break. Can bind a creature.
items.effect: 50 feet of hemp rope. Has 2 hit points and can be burst with a DC 17 Strength check.

items.name: Rope, Silk (50 ft)
items.description_summary: 50 ft of silk rope. DC 17 STR check to break. Lighter than hemp.
items.effect: 50 feet of silk rope. Has 2 hit points and can be burst with a DC 17 Strength check. Weighs half as much as hemp rope.

items.name: Backpack

passive_effects.summary: Holds up to 30 lb / 1 cubic foot of gear.

items.description_summary: Holds 30 lb / 1 cubic foot of gear.
items.effect: A backpack holds up to 30 lb or 1 cubic foot of gear.

items.name: Bedroll
items.description_summary: Sleeping roll for camping. Required for comfortable long rest in the wild.
items.effect: A bedroll provides a comfortable place to sleep when camping outdoors.

items.name: Tinderbox
items.description_summary: Flint, steel, tinder. Light a torch in 1 action. Start a campfire in 1 minute.
items.effect: This small container holds flint, fire steel, and tinder. Using it to light a torch or campfire takes an action.

items.name: Rations (1 day)
items.description_summary: One day's rations: dried food suitable for extended travel.
items.effect: Rations consist of dry foods suitable for extended travel.

items.name: Waterskin
items.description_summary: Holds 4 pints of liquid. Full weight 5 lb.
items.effect: A waterskin holds 4 pints of liquid.

items.name: Lantern, Hooded
items.description_summary: Bright light 30 ft, dim light 30 ft more. Burns 6 hours per flask of oil. Hood dims to 5 ft.
items.effect: A hooded lantern burns for 6 hours on one flask of oil, shedding bright light in a 30-foot radius and dim light for an additional 30 feet. An action can reduce the light to a 5-foot radius.

items.name: Oil (flask)
items.description_summary: Flask of lamp oil. Fuels lanterns 6 hr. Can be hurled as improvised ranged weapon (fire damage).
items.effect: Oil usually comes in a clay flask that holds 1 pint. As an action, you can splash the oil in this flask onto a creature within 5 feet of you or throw it up to 20 feet, shattering it on impact. In either case, make a ranged attack against a target creature or object. On a hit, the target is covered in oil. If the target takes any fire damage before the oil dries, the target takes an additional 5 fire damage from the burning oil.

items.name: Crowbar

passive_effects.summary: Advantage on STR checks to force open doors and containers.

items.description_summary: Grants advantage on Strength checks to pry open containers or doors.
items.effect: Using a crowbar grants advantage on Strength checks where the crowbar's leverage can be applied.

items.name: Hammer
items.description_summary: A carpenter's hammer, useful for driving pitons and basic construction.
items.effect: A sturdy hand hammer. Used to drive pitons and perform basic carpentry.

items.name: Pitons (10)
items.description_summary: 10 iron pitons for climbing or anchoring ropes.
items.effect: An iron spike about 12 inches long. Used for anchoring rope while climbing.

items.name: Grappling Hook
items.description_summary: Throw to anchor rope on a ledge or railing.
items.effect: A grappling hook can be attached to 50 feet of rope and thrown up to 20 feet to hook onto a ledge or railing.

items.name: Mirror, Steel
items.description_summary: A small polished steel mirror. Useful for scouting around corners or signaling.
items.effect: A small steel mirror, useful for seeing around corners or signaling.

items.name: Pole (10-foot)
items.description_summary: 10-foot wooden pole. Useful for probing suspicious floors and triggering traps at range.

items.name: Chalk (1 piece)
items.description_summary: White chalk for marking walls, drawing maps, or leaving trail signs.
items.effect: A piece of chalk for writing or marking surfaces.

items.name: Healer's Kit

granted_actions.name: Stabilize
granted_actions.description: Stabilize a creature at 0 HP without a medicine check. Uses 1 charge.

items.description_summary: 10 uses. Stabilize a dying creature with an action without a Medicine check.
items.effect: This kit is a leather pouch containing bandages, salves, and splints. It has 10 uses. As an action, you can expend one use of the kit to stabilize a creature that has 0 hit points, without needing to make a Wisdom (Medicine) check.
